caption: The video shows a presentation slide for a course titled "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING". The background of the slide is white, with a blue header at the top and a blue footer at the bottom. Centered within the header is the text "Tutorial – 1". The footer contains the text "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay". An "NPTEL" logo, featuring a stylized orange snowflake and blue text, is located in the bottom-left corner of the white area. Throughout the sequence, the slide remains static, though a mouse cursor is visible in the center-right area of the frame. In the final stage of the sequence, a faint, blurry white rectangular artifact appears horizontally across the middle of the slide, partially obscuring the empty space beneath the header. No people are present in the frames.
